title: Did Nikola Tesla hear aliens first? Here's all about the century-old ‘Black Knight satellite’ UFO conspiracy theory
description: A persistent myth of a 13,000-year-old 'Black Knight satellite' of possible alien origin has captivated many. However, scientific explanations point to lost space debris, like a thermal insulation blanket from NASA's STS-88 mission, as the source of these claims.

title: New York Surpasses California in UFO Sightings Rankings
description: New York has recently overtaken California in UFO sightings per capita, according to a new ranking that has sparked renewed interest in alien encounters and government transparency. The data, sourced from the National UFO Reporting Center, reveals that New York recorded over 8,300 sightings since 1974. This rise is attributed to the state's large population, which generates more reports. The ranking coincides with heightened public interest in UFO disclosures following President Trump's announcement to release government records related to extraterrestrial life. While the numbers reflect reported sightings, they do not confirm alien encounters, highlighting the ongoing fascination with UFO phenomena in America.

title: New York Overtakes California in UFO Sightings Per Capita in New Alien Abduction...
description: A new UFO sightings ranking has placed New York ahead of California and among America’s top three states on a per-capita basis, with Delaware taking the top spot.

title: Is the truth out there? US registers aliens.gov as Trump pledges UFO files release
description: Web domain added to government registry a month after president directed agencies to release files relating to UAPs It was a gift to conspiracy theorists. Last week, the US Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency registered the alien.gov and aliens.gov web domains, adding both to the official government website registry. Continue reading...
